name: sherpa-container
description: Dashboard card with header, metrics, and data sections. Content supplied via inline child elements.

data-variant.description: Layout variant — fit (hugs content), resizable (grid-driven spans), fill (fills parent)

data-col-span.description: Column span in the content grid (resizable variant only)

data-row-span.description: Row span in the content grid (resizable variant only)

data-menu-open.description: Whether the context menu is open

slots.content: Single content wrapper for metrics, sections, and any other container content

methods.getColSpan(): Get current column span from data-col-span attribute
methods.getRowSpan(): Get current row span from data-row-span attribute
